variables.defaultJwtSecret: [uniqueString(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', take(format('{0}{1}kv{2}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'), uniqueString(subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), 24)), subscription().subscriptionId, 'jwt')]
variables.defaultCookieSecret: [uniqueString(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', take(format('{0}{1}kv{2}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'), uniqueString(subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), 24)), subscription().subscriptionId, 'cookie')]

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', take(format('{0}{1}kv{2}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'), uniqueString(subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), 24)), parameters('apiIdentityPrincipalId'), variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]

properties.value: [uniqueString(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', take(format('{0}{1}kv{2}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'), uniqueString(subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), 24)), subscription().subscriptionId, 'meili')]

Redis capacity: 0=C0 (250MB), 1=C1 (1GB), etc. For P family use 1-5

properties.value: [format('rediss://:{0}@{1}:6380', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Cache/redis', format('{0}-redis-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), '2024-11-01').primaryKey, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Cache/redis', format('{0}-redis-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), '2024-11-01').hostName)]
